steps.title: Spot the consequence
steps.content: Betelgeuse became 40% brighter, and its ranking rose from 10th to 7th. The transition should show that the second change followed as a result of the first.

steps.title: Choose the causal signal
steps.content: Choice A signals a summary. Choice C signals a more specific restatement, and Choice D signals an example. The relationship here is cause and effect: the brightness increase led to the ranking change. The answer is B.
